commandThresholds.name: pnpm run build
commandThresholds.description: Main production build on a clean environment.

commandThresholds.name: pnpm run test:mirofish:gate
commandThresholds.description: Governance and core classroom contract path.

commandThresholds.name: pnpm exec playwright test e2e/tests/home-to-generation.spec.ts --reporter=line

notes: These values are baseline budgets for trend monitoring and are not hard product-level SLOs.
Future `mirofish` and provider-path benchmark tests should enrich this file with measurable service-level targets.
